original_image_tags: In the upper right corner of the document, there are large, handwritten initials in black ink, appearing to be "L.B.F."

elements.description: A typed memorandum from McChord Flight Service Center dated 10 August 1949 regarding a UFO sighting near Medford, Oregon. The document contains header information, recipient details, and a list of five witnesses. It includes two 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps (one crossed out at the top, one at the bottom) and a handwritten annotation 'F.I.' in the top right corner.
